overall.description: A cinematic game engine scene depicting a woman sitting on a stone waterfront at night, illuminated by blue moonlight and distant warm lamps. A mysterious figure emerges from the mist and approaches across the open plaza, creating a tense, atmospheric moment.

events.description: a silhouetted figure emerges from the distant mist and begins walking toward the foreground

agents.ego_description: woman sits on the dock edge holding a small device, watching the approaching figure

notable_agents.action: figure walking slowly from the misty background toward the dock, gradually becoming more visible

entered.detail: weathered stone ledge where the woman sits
dark silhouette of gothic-style buildings against the night sky
warm yellow lamps glowing in the distance across the water
low-lying fog hovering over the water surface
calm reflective water between the dock and the distant lights

segments.scene_description: A static cinematic shot shows a woman sitting alone on a stone waterfront at night, bathed in blue moonlight. The atmosphere is thick with mist and the distant glow of warm lights. Around six seconds, a mysterious silhouetted figure emerges from the fog and begins a slow approach toward the dock, creating a sense of anticipation.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a quiet, moonlit waterfront that shifts from a state of solitary stillness to one of mounting tension. It begins with a static view of a woman sitting alone on a stone dock, bathed in cool blue moonlight and surrounded by a thick, atmospheric mist. As the scene lingers, the distant glow of warm lamps pierces through the haze, highlighting the isolation of the waterfront. The composition then transforms as a mysterious silhouetted figure emerges from the fog, slowly advancing across the open plaza toward the dock. This movement breaks the initial silence, turning the serene nocturnal landscape into a space of anticipation.
